user.title: EnerGenie EG-PM2-LAN
user.description: Enter the IP address and password of your EnerGenie power strip. Control is 100% local over the native LAN protocol (TCP).

data_description.host: The local IP address of the power strip.
data_description.password: The device password (set in the EnerGenie configuration).
data_description.mac: Optional. The MAC printed on the strip's label (88:B6:27:...), only used for a nicer device card.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Check the IP address, port and that the strip is powered on.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. The password is incorrect.
error.invalid_mac: The MAC address format is invalid (expected aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff).
